items.content: Two people have been arrested after the device was thrown, as far-right demonstrators clashed with counterprotesters.

items.title: What do investigators say about the Gracie Mansion device? #world
items.standfirst: The device, the arrests, and the investigation Law enforcement confirmed that a device ignited outside the New York City mayor’s official residence during dueling protests was an improvised explosive device. The NYPD said the device contained explosive materials and fragmentation that could have…

items.title: Explosive device thrown outside of Zohran Mamdani’s residence at anti-Islam protest
items.standfirst: Two men are in custody in connection with incident after anti-Islam demonstrators clashed with counterprotestersNew York police have confirmed that an improvised explosive device was thrown outside Zohran Mamdani’s official residence on Saturday when anti-Islam demonstrators, led by rightwing influencer Jake Lang, clashed with counterprotesters.New York police commissioner Jessica Tisch confirmed that a preliminary bomb squad analysis of the device that was ignited and thrown during the protest had “determined that it is not a hoax device or a smoke bomb”. Continue reading...
items.content: Two men are in custody in connection with incident after anti-Islam demonstrators clashed with counterprotestersNew York police have confirmed that an improvised explosive device was thrown outside Zohran Mamdani’s official residence on Saturday when anti-Islam demonstrators, led by rightwing influencer Jake Lang, clashed with counterprotesters.New York police commissioner Jessica Tisch confirmed that a preliminary bomb squad analysis of the device that was ignited and thrown during the protest had “determined that it is not a hoax device or a smoke bomb”. Continue reading...

ai_summary: FBI investigating the incident
Device thrown during anti-Islam demonstration
Two people arrested in connection
Improvised explosive device contained fragmentation
No injuries reported

clusters.title: Ex-rapper Balendra Shah set to be Nepal PM after party’s landslide election win
clusters.neutral_headline: Ex Rapper Balendra Shah Set To Be Nepal PM

items.title: Ex-rapper Balendra Shah set to be Nepal PM after party’s landslide election win
items.standfirst: Shah’s Rastriya Swatantra party secures thumping victory in first poll since gen Z protests that toppled government Balendra Shah, the rapper turned politician and popular figurehead of a gen Z revolution, looks set to become Nepal’s next prime minister after his party won by an unprecedented margin.Shah, known widely as Balen, and his Rastriya Swatantra party (RSP) secured a rare landslide victory in the first election since youth-led protests during which dozens were killed and the former government was toppled. Continue reading...
items.content: Shah’s Rastriya Swatantra party secures thumping victory in first poll since gen Z protests that toppled government Balendra Shah, the rapper turned politician and popular figurehead of a gen Z revolution, looks set to become Nepal’s next prime minister after his party won by an unprecedented margin.Shah, known widely as Balen, and his Rastriya Swatantra party (RSP) secured a rare landslide victory in the first election since youth-led protests during which dozens were killed and the former government was toppled. Continue reading...

items.title: Rapper and Gen Z protest leader on track to be Nepal's PM
items.standfirst: A former rapper is on track to win Nepal’s first election since youth-driven protests toppled the incumbent political leadership last year.
items.content: A former rapper is on track to win Nepal’s first election since youth-driven protests toppled the incumbent political leadership last year.

items.title: A new Nepali party, led by an ex-rapper, is set for a landslide win in parliamentary election
items.standfirst: A Nepali political party led by an ex-rapper is set for a landslide victory in the country's first parliamentary election since Gen Z protests ousted the old leadership that has ruled the Himalayan nation for decades.
items.content: A Nepali political party led by an ex-rapper is set for a landslide victory in the country's first parliamentary election since Gen Z protests ousted the old leadership that has ruled the Himalayan nation for decades.(Image credit: Niranjan Shrestha)

items.title: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah unseats Nepal's ex-PM as he heads for victory
items.standfirst: Thursday's general election was the first since violent youth-led protests toppled the government in September.
items.content: Thursday's general election was the first since violent youth-led protests toppled the government in September.

items.content: Handler Lee Cox said Bruin was the "dog of a lifetime" as he accepted the award.

items.title: Four-year-old clumber spaniel called Bruin wins best in show at Crufts
items.standfirst: Owner Lee Cox describes the winner as ‘dog of a lifetime’ as he claims the crown at prestigious dog contest Bruin, a clumber spaniel, has won the best in show prize at Crufts, which took place at the National Exhibition Centre (NEC) in Birmingham.His owner, Lee Cox, described the four-year-old Bruin as “a dog of a lifetime” as he won the competition and was met with roaring cheers from the audience. Continue reading...
